arts.ttl: BREAKING: Championship clash at Luton Town delayed due to medical emergency before kick-off
arts.sum: Luton were set to take on Championship rivals Swansea at Kenilworth Road on Saturday but the game was postponed for 15 minutes after an emergency among supporters at the game

arts.ttl: Edwards accepts pressure is firmly on Luton at Kenilworth Road after awful away run
arts.sum: Town have only lost once in seven on home soil

arts.ttl: REVEALED: The Luton Town XI that Hatters fans picked to face Swansea City
arts.sum: Supporters choose their Hatters side to face the Swans

arts.ttl: Luton boss refuses to be drawn into whether the Hatters are now involved in a relegation fight
arts.sum: Town are 19th in the Championship table following 18 matches

arts.ttl: Luton boss pleased with how Town's players reacted to his public dressing down at Carrow Road
arts.sum: Hatters chief was highly critical of his squad after Canaries loss

arts.ttl: Forgotten Swansea City star inching closer to first team return after year of injury hell
arts.sum: Luke Williams has confirmed that Josh Ginnelly has returned to training, and has praised the club's 'incredible' medical staff for helping him work his way back on the long road back from injury. Williams says he hopes he's played a small part in supporting the forward in his prolonged recovery, but says a majority of the credit has to go the club's medical team, whom he says have worked tirelessly to get Ginnelly back on the grass.

arts.ttl: Edwards reveals Luton squad has been hit by 'freakish' injuries ahead of Swans clash
arts.sum: Burke and Walsh remain absent for Luton

arts.ttl: Barcelona injury news: Catalan giants receive triple fitness boost as Ronald Araujo plan is revealed
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick says that he is planning to hand Ronald Araujo his first appearance of the campaign against Leganes on December 15.

arts.ttl: Here's 15 more must-see Luton Town pictures from 1959 to 1985
arts.sum: We’ve nipped into our archives once again to bring you more pictures Hatters pictures from over the years.

arts.ttl: Preview: Luton Town vs. Swansea City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Luton Town and Swansea City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
